title: astragalus circumlacustris
intro: Astragalus circumlacustris, also known as the Lake Xingkai bean trefoil, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family, native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and immune-boosting effects, which are thought to be due to the presence of saponins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Astragalus circumlacustris include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, flu, and other respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the root and rhizome of Astragalus circumlacustris are typically used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed as a supplement to promote overall well-being and resilience.
